last_task.subject: Resolve fleet escalation: spark blocked on task #199 — Requires human action: whoabuddy needs to create GitHub PAT for forge0btc (repo scope). Steps after creation: 1) On Forge (192.168.1.15): arc creds set --service github --key token --value <PAT>, 2) echo <PAT> | gh auth login --with-token, 3) Retry push fix/erc8004-transfer-post-condition branch and open PR on aibtcdev/skills.
